examples: Our children share a love of music
The two countries share a long border

meanings.definition: have, give, or receive a share of
give out as one's portion or share

examples: I'd like to share this idea with you

meanings.definition: have in common; held or experienced in common
examples: two shared valence electrons forming a bond between adjacent nuclei

meanings.definition: distributed in portions (often equal) on the basis of a plan or purpose
